title: botrychium lunaria var. lunaria
intro: Botrychium lunaria var. lunaria, also known as Moonwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, characterized by its unique, umbrella-like fronds and small, yellowish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. Moonwort is believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and even act as a natural diuretic to remove excess fluids from the body. In herbal preparations, Moonwort is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
